channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Collingwood survive strong West Coast challenge in Scott Pendlebury’s record AFL appearance
item.description: Collingwood have held off a determined West Coast Eagles side to secure a 10-point victory in a tightly contested AFL match at the MCG, played during Scott Pendlebury’s record-breaking 433rd game. Whi...

item.title: RSPCA advises dog owners on safe use of damp towels to prevent heatstroke in pets
item.description: The RSPCA has issued guidance to dog owners regarding the use of damp towels as a method to keep pets cool during hot weather. While many pet owners rely on this common technique to help prevent heats...

item.title: Hannah Murray Describes Her Experience with a Wellness Cult and Mental Health Crisis in New Memoir
item.description: Actor Hannah Murray, best known for her roles in Skins and Game of Thrones, has spoken openly about her experiences with fame, the pressures of acting, and the psychological breakdown that followed he...

item.title: Boni Khalwale Pays Tribute to Cousin Boaz Shipimilu After His Death
item.description: Kakamega Senator Boni Khalwale has announced the death of his cousin, Boaz Lichooti Shipimilu, describing him as a respected teacher and politician who made a strong contribution to the education sect...

item.title: Analysis of Speaker Mike Johnson’s Political Position Amid Growing GOP and Trump Tensions
item.description: This opinion article by John Casey published on Raw Story examines the political standing of U.S. House Speaker Mike Johnson in relation to President Donald Trump and internal Republican Party tension...

item.title: Marilyn Gladu discusses leaving the Conservatives and her conversations with Mark Carney amid party tensions
item.description: Conservative MP Marilyn Gladu has offered new details about her decision to cross the floor and join the Liberal Party, citing dissatisfaction within the Conservative caucus and describing what she ca...

item.title: Experts call for broader reforms beyond strict laws to address unsafe abortions in Tanzania
item.description: A recent investigation by The Citizen has revealed the growing underground network of unsafe abortions in Tanzania, showing how women are increasingly relying on secret channels due to fear, limited r...

item.title: Collingwood edge West Coast in Pendlebury record game overshadowed by late injuries
item.description: In a dramatic AFL clash at the MCG, Collingwood faced West Coast in a match that will be remembered for Scott Pendlebury setting a new games record and a series of late-game injuries that overshadowed...

item.title: Spider-Noir TV review: Nicolas Cage leads a campy noir Spider-Man spin-off
item.description: Spider-Noir is a new television spin-off that reimagines the Spider-Man mythos in a stylised, Depression-era New York setting, with Nicolas Cage starring as Ben Reilly, also known as The Spider. The s...

item.title: Manases Carpio files perjury complaint vs. Trillanes over alleged false statements in House hearing
item.description: Manases Carpio, the husband of Vice President Sara Duterte, has formally filed a perjury complaint against former Senator Antonio Trillanes IV. The complaint was submitted before the Pasig City Prosec...

item.title: San Manuel boosts reward to ₱250,000 for information on ex-beauty queen and teacher’s killing in Isabela
item.description: The municipal government of San Manuel in Isabela has increased the reward money for information that could lead to the arrest of suspects involved in the killing of former beauty queen and public sch...

item.title: Security operation in Bannu: one police officer martyred and eight militants killed
item.description: An intelligence-based operation (IBO) conducted in Bannu district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa resulted in the killing of eight terrorists, while one police officer was martyred and another injured during th...

item.title: Police recover remains of woman allegedly killed and buried by son-in-law in Cotabato City
item.description: Police authorities in Cotabato City have recovered the skeletal remains of a 40-year-old woman who was allegedly killed by her son-in-law and buried in a swampy area months earlier. According to polic...

item.title: Public Interest SA demands urgent financial recovery plan from City of Johannesburg over Eskom debt crisis
item.description: Civil society organisation Public Interest SA has formally demanded that the City of Johannesburg address its worsening financial crisis within 14 days or potentially face legal action. The warning fo...

item.title: Sassa delays lifestyle audits ordered by Public Protector on implicated officials
item.description: The South African Social Security Agency (Sassa) has not yet implemented lifestyle audits on 11 officials implicated in the irregular awarding of a multimillion-rand tender, despite a remedial order i...

item.title: Erwin Blumenfeld and the Surrealist Revolution in Mid-Century Fashion Photography
item.description: Erwin Blumenfeld (1897–1969) was a German-American photographer whose innovative approach to fashion imagery helped redefine visual aesthetics in the mid-20th century. Deeply influenced by Dadaism and...

item.title: Severe traffic delays at Dover as EU border checks lead to long queues for 8,000 travellers
item.description: Hundreds of families travelling from the UK to continental Europe experienced significant disruption at the Port of Dover on Saturday, as new EU border checks contributed to severe congestion. Around ...

item.title: Godbless Lema Returns to Chadema and Issues Public Apology Amid Party Reconciliation
item.description: Tanzanian opposition politics has seen a notable development with the reported return of political figure Godbless Lema to the opposition party Chadema, accompanied by a public apology for his previou...

item.title: Telangana: BRS Leader Chinthalapadi Madu Found Dead, Police Investigate
item.description: In a disturbing development from Suryapet district of Telangana, Chinthalapadi Madu, a local leader of the Bharat Rashtra Samithi (BRS), was discovered dead inside a gunny bag near Yerkaram stage. Acc...

item.title: Opinion piece argues Liberal MPs should publicly defend their opposition to the Carney-Smith agreement
item.description: This opinion article by Sharan Kaur examines the political implications surrounding dissent among 14 Liberal Members of Parliament over the reported Carney-Smith deal. The author argues that these MPs...
